key_facts: From the menu on the left side of the Authentication methods page, set the Number of methods required to reset to 2 .
At this time, Microsoft Entra Connect and cloud sync don't support sharing password policy details with the cloud.
SSPR only displays the cloud password policy details, and can't show on-premises policies.
Beginning September 30, 2025, authentication methods can't be managed in these legacy MFA and SSPR policies.
We recommend customers use the manual migration control to migrate to the Authentication methods policy by the deprecation date.

Prerequisites

 To finish this tutorial, you need the following resources and privileges:

 
 A working Microsoft Entra tenant with at least a Microsoft Entra ID P1 license is required for password reset.
An account with at least the Authentication Policy Administrator role.
